response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video to identify performers (Kaela Kovalskia, Ouro Kronii). 2. Detected vocal song segment (00:00-00:43) and identified it as Kaela's own song 'Senyuman'. 3. Transcribed lyrics for 'Senyuman' segment from audio. 4. Identified dialogue segment (00:43-01:54). 5. Detected second vocal song segment (01:54-04:59) and identified it via lyrics as 'Chiisana Koi no Uta'. 6. Used search tool to find official Japanese lyrics and Romaji for 'Chiisana Koi no Uta'. 7. Formatted all data into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: The video features two Hololive VTubers, Kaela Kovalskia and Ouro Kronii. It begins with Kaela singing an Indonesian song, followed by a dialogue sequence involving a 'Raft' game theme, and concludes with a duet performance of the Japanese song 'Chiisana Koi no Uta'.

scenes.description: Kaela Kovalskia sings a short segment of an Indonesian song titled 'Senyuman' while showcasing images of herself and Kobo Kanaeru on a tablet.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: Aku pasti bisa, Senyuman... Senyuman... Aku pasti bisa... Balik matpi semua dan menghadapinya... Aku yakin pasti bisa... Dan ku jalani hidupku dengan senyuman...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: I can definitely do it, Smile... Smile... I can definitely do it... Turn back, all and face it... I'm sure I can do it... And I live my life with a smile...

scenes.description: A dialogue scene set in a 3D environment resembling the game 'Raft', where Kaela interacts with steering wheels labeled with questions, engaging in a humorous conversation.
Kaela Kovalskia and Ouro Kronii perform a duet cover of the song 'Chiisana Koi no Uta' on a 3D stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: hiroi uchuu no kazu aru hitotsu aoi chikyuu no hiroi sekai de chiisana koi no omoi ha todoku chiisana shima no anata no moto he anata to deai toki ha nagareru omoi wo kome ta tegami mo fueru itsushika ni nin tagaini hibiku tokini hageshiku tokini setsunaku hibiku ha tooku haruka kanata he yasashii uta ha sekai wo kaeru hora anata nitotte daiji na nin hodo sugu soba ni iru no tada anata ni dake todoi te hoshii hibike koi no uta anata ha kizuku ni nin ha aruku kurai michi demo hibi terasu gatsu nigirishime ta te hanasu koto naku omoi ha tsuyoku eien chikau eien no fuchi kitto boku ha iu omoi kawara zu onaji kotoba wo sore demo tari zu namida ni kawari yorokobi ni nari kotoba ni deki zu tada dakishimeru yume nara ba same nai de yume nara ba same nai de anata to sugoshi ta toki eien no hoshi to naru hora anata nitotte daiji na nin hodo sugu soba ni iru no tada anata ni dake todoi te hoshii hibike koi no uta
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: One of the many things in the vast universe, in the wide world of the blue Earth, my small love's feelings reach you, to you on a small island. Meeting you, time flows, and letters filled with feelings increase. Before I knew it, both of us were resonating with each other, sometimes intensely, sometimes painfully, resonating far, far away. A gentle song changes the world. Look, the person most important to you is right by your side. I just want it to reach only you, let this love song ring out... [Full lyrics continue]
